summary: Fixed 34 URL issues in the ALdeci-7 Postman collection: rebuilt 34 raw URLs from {{apiBase}} shorthand to fully-qualified {{base_url}}/api/v1/... URLs, fixed pipeline/* paths to brain/*, and corrected AutoFix Get Fix Details raw URL to include the path variable. All raw URLs are now consistent with path arrays and use the correct router prefixes verified against actual source code.
issues: AutoFix Get Fix Details raw URL was missing {{autofix_id}} variable after regex fix — corrected manually.
IaC List Scans / Create Scan / Get Findings all point to GET/POST /api/v1/iac root since /scans and /findings sub-paths do not exist in the actual iac_router.py.
OSS scan/trivy and scan/grype paths were already correct — no change needed there.
Inventory SBOM and license-compliance both point to /api/v1/inventory/applications (closest valid endpoint) since the actual endpoints require an app ID in the path.
